updates.tweet_text:
3 out of 4 of today's targets hit in #ES_F And only 10am. Don't overcomplicate summer trading. 95% holding runners long. Every 1-3 days, we get a vol spike where we add size to longs. I only trade long, and I never short.

7604 (hit), 7611 (hit), 7621 (hit). Just 7640 left https://t.co/nfLBD0xt0j
updates.notes: 7604 and 7621 are observations of hit targets; 7611 and 7640 are morning-plan levels. No new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @Datmonster29 I don't add again unless we get a failed breakdown. I'm only getting paid in the sense that my runner continues to appreciate as targets hit
updates.notes: Trade management commentary about runner and targets hitting; no new actionable price level named.

updates.tweet_text: @lockingprofits Yes I did! I quit shorting in early 2024 though. I did short for my career prior to that though. There was an opportunity cost to playing those shorts though, I'd miss the Failed Breakdown squeeze afterwards and those are higher win rate
updates.notes: Conversational reply about trading style/history. No price levels named, no actionable entries, targets, or watches mentioned.

updates.tweet_text: @lockingprofits I didn't like how I'd catch a 40 point short then I'd miss the 150 point rip in an hour we'd get right after
updates.notes: Conversational reply about trading style/regret; no actionable price levels named whatsoever.

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: 7570-73 was support today, held exact, and off we went. Now just ride runner for 7640 which is the next magnet. NEwsletter out soon talking possible dip buy entries if we luck out and get another volatility spike this week. We are close to a *massive* move
